rule_metadata.author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r), Red Canary (Idea)
rule_metadata.title: Osacompile Execution By Potentially Suspicious Applet/Osascript

rules.rule_text:
title: Osacompile Execution By Potentially Suspicious Applet/Osascript
id: a753a6af-3126-426d-8bd0-26ebbcb92254
status: test
description: Detects potential suspicious applet or osascript executing "osacompile".
references:
- https://redcanary.com/blog/mac-application-bundles/
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r), Red Canary (Idea)
date: 2023-04-03
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059.002
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: macos
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith:
    - /applet
    - /osascript
    CommandLine|contains: osacompile
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
